perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white outfit, stands in front of a freezer at a Costco warehouse, gesturing towards the products. (2) She opens the freezer door and retrieves a blue and orange box of seafood buns, showing it to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining area where the woman and a friend (wearing a dark beret) are seated at a table. (4) They present cooked white buns on a plate and split one open to show the steaming seafood filling inside. (5) The two women are filmed from a medium shot as they eat the buns, talk excitedly, and provide hand gestures of approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track plays. A high-pitched female voice speaks with an enthusiastic tone. Faint ambient warehouse store noise is heard. (2) Frequent cartoon-style sound effects (pings, dings) sync with text overlays. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner, studio-like indoor sound as two female voices interact in a conversational but fast-paced manner. (4) The music remains constant throughout the transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '宏裕行新品' (Hong Yu New Product). (2) Decorative Hook: '一顆40元！值得嗎？' (40 per piece! Worth it?) in a bold font. (3) Functional Text: '澎湃海鮮包' (Premium Seafood Bun) variety title. (4) Functional Information: '一箱有10顆 總共399元' (10 pieces for 399 total) and '微波加熱只需700瓦兩分鐘' (700W microwave for 2 mins). (5) Decorative/CTA: '非常推薦試試看哦' (Highly recommend trying it) and '留言告訴我們' (Leave a comment to tell us).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product selection -> Home taste test -> Summary and Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators (females), 2 female shoppers visible in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main creator has long dark hair, wearing a black dress with white puffy sleeves. Her friend wears a dark beret and a light-colored knit top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene shows commercial glass-door freezers in a Costco warehouse; second scene is a modern home interior with a white marble-pattern table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and studio-style fill light.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Demonstration -> Sensory Review -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a new frozen seafood bun product from Costco, providing price information, preparation instructions, and a subjective taste test to help viewers decide if the product is worth purchasing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed focus on the brand name '宏裕行', showing the packaging clearly, and providing specific cooking instructions and price points.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced variety-show style captions and high-pitched energetic vocal delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media 'food haul/review' format, utilizing high-density text overlays to maintain viewer engagement and provide information quickly.
